name: Noire
description:
Daughter of Tharja. Timid and pessimistic, but turns into a totally different person when enraged. Appears in Fire Emblem Awakening.

Noire is a Hero who came to Ylisse from a future world! She's the daughter of Tharja, the Plegian dark mage, but her skills are with the bow.

Extremely timid, Noire is predisposed to running from conflict—and quickly too. However, she turns into a completely different person when she loses her cool—becoming more like a bold general who has fought countless battles!

Apparently, this drastic transformation has something to do with a talisman created by Tharja in the future world to embolden her meek daughter. Simply holding it allows her to harden her heart, erasing sadness and fear.

As a child, Noire always wanted to be helpful to Tharja, and constantly imitated what she was doing. I'm looking forward to seeing how they team up as members of the Order of Heroes!

Full Art By: kyusokyu (久蒼穹)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
